summary: Stable Vendor Auto-Ready feature fully tested. All 11 backend API tests pass (100%). Frontend verified: Dashboard shows Stable Vendor KPI widget with 5 metrics, Document Queue shows Routing column with Auto/Low/Manual badges, Document Detail shows Auto-Ready Routing card with decision reasoning. All expected functionality working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: StableVendorService properly evaluates vendor stability based on 5 checks: document volume, automation rate, resolution rate, correction rate, validation pass rate
Document routing correctly applies safety guards: validation state, duplicate detection, vendor match, resolver confidence, freight GL, blocking issues, layout family, alerts, amount anomaly
With current test data, no vendors qualify as stable (all have <50 docs and low rates), so all documents route to manual_review - this is correct expected behavior
Config endpoint allows adjusting thresholds (min_documents_processed, min_automation_success_rate, etc.)
Reevaluate-all endpoint runs in background to avoid blocking
Frontend components properly display routing badges and decision reasoning

success_rate.frontend: 100% (Dashboard KPI widget, Queue Routing column, Document Detail Routing card all verified)

seed_data_creation: No seed data created - used existing 60 documents in database
context_for_next_testing_agent: Stable Vendor Auto-Ready feature implemented and tested. Service in /app/backend/services/stable_vendor_service.py, router in /app/backend/routers/stable_vendor.py. With current data, 0/17 vendors are stable (insufficient volume/rates). Documents route to manual_review. Feature can be tested with config endpoint to lower thresholds temporarily.

verified_endpoints./api/stable-vendor/config GET: PASS - returns 15+ config keys including min_documents_processed, min_automation_success_rate, enabled
verified_endpoints./api/stable-vendor/config PUT: PASS - updates and persists config thresholds
verified_endpoints./api/stable-vendor/evaluate/{vendor_id}: PASS - returns stable_vendor_flag, score, checks array, reasons
verified_endpoints./api/stable-vendor/evaluate-document/{do: PASS - returns routing (auto_ready|low_priority_review|manual_review), stores decision on document
verified_endpoints./api/stable-vendor/dashboard-metrics: PASS - returns 7 KPIs: stable_vendors_count, total_vendors, auto_ready_today, low_priority_today, total_processed_today, stable_vendor_automation_rate, feature_enabled
verified_endpoints./api/stable-vendor/reevaluate-all: PASS - returns {status: 'accepted', message: '...'} and runs async

verified_ui_components.Dashboard KPI Widget: PASS - Shows Stable Vendor Auto-Ready card with 5 metrics
verified_ui_components.Queue Routing Column: PASS - Shows Routing column with Manual/Auto/Low badges
verified_ui_components.Document Detail Routing Card: PASS - Shows Auto-Ready Routing card with badge, stable vendor status, score, decision reasoning

mocked_apis.note: All APIs are live. No mocked integrations.
